sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import api from '../services/api'; const Dashboard = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const [stats, setStats] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { fetchStats(); }, []); const fetchStats = async () => { try { const response = await api.get('/dashboard/'); setStats(response.data); } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching stats:', error); setStats({}); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; const getRoleLabel = (role) => { const labels = { admin: 'Administrateur', instructor: 'Instructeur', coordinator: 'Coordinateur', supervisor: 'Superviseur', trainee: 'Stagiaire' }; return labels[role] || role; }; const trainingProgress = [ { part: 'Partie 1', completed: 75, color: '#A435F0' }, { part: 'Partie 2', completed: 60, color: '#10B981' }, { part: 'Partie 3', completed: 45, color: '#F59E0B' }, { part: 'Partie 4', completed: 30, color: '#EF4444' }, ]; const alerts = [ { type: 'warning', message: '5 soumissions en attente de correction', count: 5 }, { type: 'info', message: '3 nouveaux stagiaires ajoutés cette semaine', count: 3 }, { type: 'success', message: '2 formations terminées', count: 2 }, ]; if (loading) { return (

Chargement...

); } return (

Bienvenue{user?.first_name ? `, ${user.first_name}` : ''}!

Rôle: {getRoleLabel(user?.role)}

{(user?.role === 'supervisor' || user?.role === 'coordinator') && (

🔔 Alertes et Notifications

{alerts.map((alert, index) => (
{alert.count}
{alert.message}
))}
)}
{user?.role === 'admin' && ( <>
Total Utilisateurs
{stats?.total_users || 0}
Total Matières
{stats?.total_subjects || 0}
Total Cours
{stats?.total_courses || 0}
Total Contrôles
{stats?.total_controls || 0}
)} {user?.role === 'instructor' && ( <>
Mes Matières
{stats?.my_subjects || 0}
Mes Cours
{stats?.my_courses || 0}
Mes Contrôles
{stats?.my_controls || 0}
Soumissions en attente
{stats?.pending_submissions || 0}
)} {user?.role === 'trainee' && ( <>
Mes Cours
{stats?.my_progress || 0}
Mes Soumissions
{stats?.my_submissions || 0}
Mes Recherches
{stats?.my_research || 0}
)} {(user?.role === 'coordinator' || user?.role === 'supervisor') && ( <>
Total Stagiaires
{stats?.total_trainees || 0}
Formations Terminées
{stats?.completed_training || 0}
)} {!user?.role && ( <>
Statistique 1
-
Statistique 2
-
)}
{(user?.role === 'supervisor' || user?.role === 'coordinator') && (

📊 Progression de la Formation

{trainingProgress.map((item, index) => (
{item.part} {item.completed}%
))}
)} {(user?.role === 'supervisor' || user?.role === 'coordinator') && (

📈 Statistiques des Participants

{[ { label: 'Stagiaires Actifs', value: 45, color: '#A435F0' }, { label: 'En Formation', value: 30, color: '#10B981' }, { label: 'Terminés', value: 15, color: '#3B82F6' }, { label: 'En Attente', value: 10, color: '#F59E0B' }, ].map((item, index) => (
{item.value}
{item.label}
))}
)}
); }; export default Dashboard;
